titleStmt.title: SII 40.334: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 334. (A.R. No. B. 383 of 1933.) Talamañchipaṭnam, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a field near the police station.
This is dated Dundubhi, Āśvija, ba. 12.

Registers the Kavulu (cowl) granted by Doṇḍlēṭi Raṅganātha, the agent of Dāmmasāni Timmā-Nāyaka to the Karaṇams of certain villages viz., Mādhavāpuram, Uppalapāḍu, Gollapalli, Duganapalli, Pedakomerla and China-Komerla, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā
duṁdubhi saṁvvatsara Āśvija ba 12 lu
śrīmatu peṁmasāni tiṁmānā
yanivāri kāryaka¨rtalayina
doṁḍledi raṁgganāthunigā
ru talamaṁcipaṭnaṁ mādhavā
puraṁ puppalapāḍu gollapa
lle vodirāla danavāḍakaṁbā
ladinaduganapallepedakome¨rla
cinakome¨rla bōdupalle naṁ
danapale torravēmula mayilā
raṁ vēparāla mōdalayina
grāmāla karaṇālaku yi
cina śāsanaṁ yī grāmāla
nu kuṁdarabīḍudunēṭaṁdu
ku mīku kavalu yicina vivaraṁ
cēnu 1 ki gu¨rta 2 nu kāvali
vātikere yenimidi yē
midi yeṁḍladanakānu tapaka
naḍapagalavāraṁ tapitimā
yaṁ nāgōvubrāhmala vadhiyiṁ
cina pāpāna pōvuvāraṁ
Ani yicina kavulu kaṁṭi
śrīraṁgga
Digital edition of SII 40.334 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
